name: Chinese Butterfly
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Soy sauce or to taste
6 Whole boneless skinless chicken breasts butterflied
Radish or olive slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground ham, finely diced celery, cabbage, onions, eggs, bread crumbs, fresh oysters, pork sausage, and soy sauce in a large bowl.
2. Divide the mixture into six equal portions and mound each portion evenly on each butterflied chicken breast.
3. Sprinkle paprika over the top of each mounded portion.
4. Add dried parsley to the mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees until brown, 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until juices run clear when the center is poked with a fork.
6. Garnish with radish slices or olive slices for an attractive butterfly appearance.
7. Cut into halves and serve.
